shopify:Title: Ready to go
shopify:Body (HTML): Life moves fast, and your hair should too. This kit features DAFNI Active, the perfect on-the-go companion for a flawless touch-up on the go. Cordless and powerful, it’s your secret weapon for staying polished between meetings, flights, or gym sessions. Elevate your vibe instantly with KLIX Rose Gold Bows for a soft, metallic glow, or keep it effortlessly chic with our Minimalist Black clips. No matter where you’re headed, you’re always just one click away from perfection.

shopify:Title: The Urban Edit
shopify:Body (HTML): Meet The Urban Edit: your 4-piece power kit for the girl who treats the sidewalk like a runway. It starts with the DAFNI Muse, our narrow smoothing brush that styles everything from short layers to perfect, supple waves with total precision. Add the DAFNI Icon (Amber) for all-day control and quick touch-ups that keep you looking flawless through every urban adventure. When you're ready to shift the vibe, snap on your KLIX Black Bows—the magnetic finish that amplifies your look in just one click. You might not know where your day ends, but with this edit, you’ll always arrive in style.
